name: Graphico, Inc.
summary: Graphico, Inc. plans, develops, manufactures, and distributes health related products for 20's to 50's age women in Japan. The company offers health care products, including diet juices, diet candy and chocolate supplements, and fat burning supplements; and body care products, such as herbal hot pads, bath salts, and panty liners, as well as soap/perfume/peeling for feet. It also provides skin care products comprising wrinkle care and BB cream; and life care products consisting of orange oil basis cleaners and oxygen system detergents. The company was formerly known as Studio Graphico Inc. and changed its name to Graphico, Inc. in 2013. Graphico, Inc. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
